heading: This Afternoon
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Chance of showers and thunderstorms, except a rising chance in the Adirondacks and St Lawrence Valley; severe storms possible. Highs in the mid to upper 80s, some lower 80s in New York. South to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds. Scattered showers and thunderstorms early, possibly severe, then diminishing overnight. Lows from the mid 60s to lower 70s. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph and diminishing.

heading: Wednesday
text: Partly cloudy. Scattered showers and potentially severe thunderstorms, mainly after noon. Highs from the upper 80s to mid 90s. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.
